title: Notion Shell — page + block editor primitives (pure, no sidebar/database)
description: Portable Notion-style PAGE EDITOR primitives. NotionPage (cover + header + body shell), NotionHeader (icon + title), NotionBlock (single-block renderer dispatching via prop registry, live inline-markdown decorator, hover actions menu, built-in code + equation blocks), SlashMenu (searchable block-type picker w/ keyboard nav), BlockActionsMenu (turn-into / duplicate / delete popover), InsertBlockButton ("+" trigger w/ SlashMenu popover), SortableBlockList (block reorder), InlineFormatToolbar + BlockColorPicker + MentionTypeahead + PageLayoutSection (colour + layout). The tree-nav SIDEBAR was split out into the `notion-sidebar` slice; embedded DATABASES live in the `notion-database` slice. Domain types (Database / Property / PropertyValue / DbView / DatabaseViewConfig / etc.) remain here as the single source of truth — Page references them via rowOfDatabaseId + rowProps. Pure / props-driven — host owns data + change handlers. Compose notion-sidebar + notion-shell + notion-database for the full Notion-clone OS.
